title: GS1 Despatch Advice (ASN)
description: Advance Ship Notice — Nota de Entrega. Sent when goods leave the vendor's warehouse. Provides driver/carrier details, SSCC pallet barcode for one-scan receiving, and pharmaceutical lot/expiry tracking. Must be issued before or simultaneously with the Invoice. / Aviso de Embarque. Enviado cuando la mercancía sale del almacén del vendedor.

document_number.description: ASN document number. / Número del ASN.

related_order.description: References the ORDER_CONFIRMED document_number that triggered this shipment. Part of the Three-Way Match correlation triangle. / Referencia al document_number de la ORDER_CONFIRMED que disparó este despacho.

status.description: Shipment status. SHIPPED is the initial status when ASN is issued. / Estado del despacho. SHIPPED es el estado inicial al emitir el ASN.

issued_at.description: When the ASN was issued (goods leave warehouse). / Cuando se emitió el ASN (mercancía sale del almacén).

estimated_delivery.description: Estimated arrival time at ship_to location. / Hora estimada de llegada al destino.

shipper.description: The party dispatching the goods (vendor's warehouse). GLN identifies the specific warehouse location. / El participante que despacha la mercancía. El GLN identifica la ubicación específica del almacén.

ship_to.description: The party receiving the goods. SICM is validated here before the truck is dispatched. / El participante que recibe la mercancía. El SICM se valida aquí antes de despachar.

carrier.description: Carrier/logistics provider details. / Detalles del transportista.

tracking_reference.description: Carrier's tracking number or waybill. / Número de seguimiento del transportista.

driver.description: Driver identification. Required for SENIAT and MPPS spot checks at delivery point. / Identificación del conductor. Requerida para inspecciones SENIAT y MPPS en punto de entrega.

national_id.description: Driver's Venezuelan national ID. / Cédula venezolana del conductor.

vehicle_plate.description: Vehicle license plate. / Placa del vehículo.

packaging.description: Shipment packaging summary. The SSCC is the key GS1 identifier enabling one-scan pallet receiving. / Resumen del embalaje del despacho. El SSCC es el identificador GS1 clave para recepción con un solo escaneo.

total_packages.description: Total number of physical packages in this shipment. / Número total de paquetes físicos en este despacho.

sscc.description: GS1 Serial Shipping Container Code (18 digits). When the receiving warehouse scans this barcode, their ERP expands all GTINs, lots, and quantities inside the pallet without opening boxes. / Código SSCC GS1 (18 dígitos). Al escanear este código, el ERP del receptor expande todos los GTINs, lotes y cantidades del palé sin abrir cajas.

lines.description: Shipment line items. Each line matches a line from the ORDER_CONFIRMED. / Líneas del despacho. Cada línea corresponde a una línea de la ORDER_CONFIRMED.

related_order_line.description: References the line_id in the ORDER_CONFIRMED. / Referencia el line_id en la ORDER_CONFIRMED.

pharma_tracking.description: Mandatory pharmaceutical traceability fields. Required for product recall management (farmacovigilancia). / Campos obligatorios de trazabilidad farmacéutica. Requeridos para gestión de alertas sanitarias.

lot_number.description: Manufacturing lot/batch number. / Número de lote de fabricación.

expiry_date.description: Product expiration date. ERP rejects items expiring within the configured threshold. / Fecha de vencimiento del producto.

manufacture_date.description: Manufacturing date (optional but recommended). / Fecha de fabricación (opcional pero recomendada).

shipped.description: Quantity actually shipped in this delivery. / Cantidad efectivamente despachada.

ordered.description: Quantity originally ordered (for variance comparison). / Cantidad originalmente pedida (para comparación de varianza).
